name: Plunder Hornchen
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Plunderteig and chill it.
2. Roll out 1/3 of the dough about 1/2 inch thick.
3. Cut into 3-inch triangles and brush each with beaten egg.
4. Place a small amount of almond paste on the base of each triangle.
5. Cover with candied fruit and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
6. Roll up gently into crescents.
7. Brush with beaten egg and let rise, covered, on a buttered baking sheet in a warm place for about 1 1/2 hours until doubled in bulk.
8. Bake at 350°F (moderate) for 20 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
9. Immediately brush with apricot preserves.
Mandelfulle:
Grind the almonds and stir in sugar. Add the egg and beat until very smooth.
